properties.entry: SELECT MAX(BQEventProperty.eventDate) as lastSeenDate, BQEventProperty.value FROM BQEventProperty JOIN EventAttributeDefinition ON BQEventProperty.name = EventAttributeDefinition.name WHERE EventAttributeDefinition.id = :eventAttributeDefinitionId AND BQEventProperty.eventDate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY BQEventProperty.value ORDER BY lastSeenDate DESC LIMIT :size
